ab: Malu namu kana ho? Prading ta di.
en: Hello everyone. Here we go.
A: Please stand up! Salute!
B: Hello.
B: Hello.
A: Please sit down.

ab: Sndamac namu, saya ge tgsaun maku huwa mesa rmengo ppuqun na kari Seediq.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的賽德克語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today I am going to teach you how to say food in Sederik.
A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: Ini mu klai mptgesa, rengo texan dungan ho?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: Ini ku qbahang, kparu hari rmengo ho?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: Qita hini, snegun kenan smepu rmengo.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.
It’s very well read.

ab: Sepu texan dungan, kparu hari hrenang.
en: Read it again. Please speak louder.
Please be quiet. Don’t talk.
A: Please take out your textbook.
B: Yes, sir.
A: Please take out your pen.

ab: Mptgesa, cmhungi ku madis ppatis da.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.
A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: Mptgesa, cmhungi ku madis sserus da.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.
B: Can I borrow your eraser?
Class is over.

ab: Betaq hini snlhayan ta han, psterung ta bobo gdregan.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
